entities.name: STRUCTURAL ADJUSTMENT PROGRAM
entities.description: Programs implemented in the 1980s and 1990s in sub-Saharan countries to liberalize economies

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies intended to open new market-led opportunities for economic growth

entities.name: MARKET LIBERALIZATION
entities.description: The process of removing government regulations and restrictions in a market to facilitate functioning and effectiveness

entities.name: ECONOMIC GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the capacity of an economy to produce goods and services

entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Basic physical and organizational structures needed for the operation of a society or enterprise

entities.name: DIVERSIFIED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of growing a variety of crops to reduce risk and improve economic stability

entities.name: ECONOMIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The shift of an economy towards more commercialized production in agriculture

entities.name: REFORMS
entities.description: Changes made to a system or law to improve it, often partially implemented

entities.name: POLICY REVERSALS
entities.description: The act of changing a previously established policy back to a former state

entities.name: INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Strong organizational structures that support market and private sector development

entities.name: MARKET AND PRIVATE SECTOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and improvement of private business activities and market mechanisms

entities.name: COMMERCIALIZED PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production aimed at selling products in the market rather than for subsistence

entities.name: PRIVATE SECTOR INVESTMENT
entities.description: Capital investment made by private individuals or companies

entities.name: STATE
entities.description: The government or central authority that previously provided support or control

entities.name: SEMI-ARID EASTERN KENYA
entities.description: The geographical region where the experiences of producer marketing groups are studied

entities.name: PRODUCER MARKETING GROUPS
entities.description: Rural institutions and producer organizations operating in imperfect markets
